description: "Update the status of an agent version (e.g., from 'building' to 'active')"

  children={"Update Agent Version Status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api/v1/registry/agent/{agent_name}/version/status"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update the status of an agent version (e.g., from 'building' to 'active')
